description.content:
Build all class configurations exactly as defined in PART 3 of the master prompt.

Requirements:
- Classes III to X
- Correct grandTotalMax
- standard/senior schemes
- aggregate subject logic
- coScholastic arrays
- countInTotal handling
- singleTotal handling
- modular structure

Output:
js/config.js

Do not implement future steps.

Build the complete form structure from PART 4.

Include:
- Sections A–G
- Action buttons
- Form containers
- Table placeholders

No logic yet.
Structure only.

Implement the cream/gold/dark design system from PART 2.

Requirements:
- typography
- layout
- forms
- section styling
- table styling
- no frameworks
- print-friendly structure

Implement:
- dynamic class switching
- subject rendering
- calculations
- aggregate logic
- totals
- percentage
- result logic
- validation

Follow PART 4 and PART 7 strictly.

Test all class configurations.

Verify:
- subject rendering
- aggregate calculations
- totals
- percentage
- pass/fail logic
- validation rules

No UI redesign.
